channel.title: ProbBrain - AI News Terminal
channel.description: AI lab announcements, arXiv papers, GitHub and HuggingFace trending, AI Hacker News, and independent writers - aggregated, deduped, and posted to @ProbBrain on Telegram.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] RateQuant: Optimal Mixed-Precision KV Cache Quantization via Rate-Distortion Theory
item.description: RateQuant optimizes LLM KV cache quantization via rate-distortion theory to allocate mixed-precision bits based on per-quantizer distortion models.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] LKV: End-to-End Learning of Head-wise Budgets and Token Selection for LLM KV Cache Eviction
item.description: LKV learns task-optimized KV cache budgets and token selection for LLMs, achieving near-lossless performance with only 15% cache retention.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Wasserstein GAN-based climate scenario generator for risk management and insurance: the case of soil subsidence
item.description: Researchers developed SwiGAN, a conditional GAN model that generates realistic drought scenarios to 2050 for insurance risk management in France.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Breaking the Illusion: When Positive Meets Negative in Multimodal Decoding
item.description: Training-free Positive-and-Negative Decoding reduces vision-language model hallucinations by contrasting visual evidence with constructed counterfactuals during inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching
item.description: Analysis shows strain and vorticity play distinct roles in flow matching integration error: strain controls exponential amplification while vorticity contributes linearly.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Hierarchical Ensemble Pipeline for Anomaly Detection in ESA Satellite Telemetry
item.description: A hierarchical ensemble pipeline using shapelet-based and statistical features detects anomalies in ESA satellite telemetry data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Toeplitz MLP Mixers are Low Complexity, Information-Rich Sequence Models
item.description: Toeplitz MLP Mixers replace attention with efficient matrix operations, reducing complexity to O(dn log n) with better training efficiency and information retention.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Canopy to Collision: A Hybrid Predictive Framework for Identifying Risk Factors in Tree-Involved Traffic Crashes
item.description: Machine learning framework identifies restraint non-use, vehicle age, and impairment as primary risk factors in tree-involved traffic crashes.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Robustness of Refugee-Matching Gains to Off-Policy Evaluation Choices
item.description: Researchers confirm refugee matching benefits are robust across multiple off-policy evaluation methods and modeling approaches.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Conditional generation of antibody sequences with classifier-guided germline-absorbing discrete diffusion
item.description: Discrete diffusion with germline-absorbing noise improves antibody sequence design by reducing memorization of germline sequences and enabling classifier-guided generation.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Enabling Unsupervised Training of Deep EEG Denoisers With Intelligent Partitioning
item.description: Self-supervised method for wearable EEG denoising partitions signals to enable training without artifact-free references, achieving state-of-the-art results.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Transformer-Based Wildlife Species Classification from Daily Movement Trajectories
item.description: Transformer models outperform LSTMs and CNNs for classifying wildlife species from GPS movement trajectories, achieving 8-22% accuracy improvements.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Medical Imaging Classification with Cold-Atom Reservoir Computing using Auto-Encoders and Surrogate-Driven Training
item.description: Quantum-classical hybrid system using neutral-atom reservoir computing with guided auto-encoders outperforms traditional approaches for polyp detection in medical imaging.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] The E$\Delta$-MHC-Geo Transformer: Adaptive Geodesic Operations with Guaranteed Orthogonality
item.description: E-MHC-Geo Transformer combines Cayley transform with Householder reflection for input-adaptive orthogonal residual connections, improving long-horizon stability.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Semantic State Abstraction Interfaces for LLM-Augmented Portfolio Decisions: Multi-Axis News Decomposition and RL Diagnostics
item.description: Framework extracts four semantic features from news for portfolio optimization, with diagnostics showing benefits for interpretation but limited outperformance versus baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] On Training in Imagination
item.description: Researchers quantify how learned dynamics and reward model errors affect model-based RL training, optimizing sample allocation and examining noisy reward tradeoffs.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Beyond Factor Aggregation: Gauge-Aware Low-Rank Server Representations for Federated LoRA
item.description: GLoRA improves federated LoRA by aggregating semantic updates in shared coordinates rather than averaging representation-dependent factors.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gated QKAN-FWP: Scalable Quantum-inspired Sequence Learning
item.description: Gated QKAN-FWP combines Fast Weight Programmers with quantum-inspired networks for scalable sequence learning, outperforming larger classical models on solar forecasting.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] STDA-Net: Spectrogram-Based Domain Adaptation for cross-dataset Sleep Stage Classification
item.description: STDA-Net uses spectrograms and deep learning with domain adaptation to classify sleep stages across different EEG datasets with 89.03% accuracy.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Geometric Kolmogorov--Arnold Network (GeoKAN)
item.description: GeoKAN introduces geometry-aware Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks that learn Riemannian metrics to adaptively warp input coordinates for improved approximation in physics-informed learning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Closed-Form Upper Bound for Admissible Learning-Rate Steps in Belief-Space Dynamics
item.description: Closed-form formula established for admissible learning-rate steps in belief-space dynamics, replacing empirical hyperparameter tuning.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Gradient Extrapolation-Based Policy Optimization
item.description: GXPO approximates multi-step lookahead for reinforcement learning using gradient extrapolation, improving LLM reasoning performance over standard GRPO.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Physics-based Digital Twins for Integrated Thermal Energy Systems Using Active Learning
item.description: Active learning couples physics-based simulations with surrogate models to enable thermal energy digital twins requiring one-fifth of typical training data.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Sparse Attention as a Range Searching Problem: Towards an Inference-Efficient Index for KV Cache
item.description: Researchers reformulate sparse attention as range searching, introducing Louver index structure to ensure zero false negatives in KV cache retrieval during LLM inference.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Revisiting Adam for Streaming Reinforcement Learning
item.description: Study identifies bounded gradient derivatives and variance-adjusted weight updates as essential for streaming RL, proposing Adaptive Q(λ) algorithm that outperforms baselines.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport
item.description: Researchers use conditional optimal transport to improve Process Reward Model calibration and confidence estimation for inference-time scaling.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] Conformal Agent Error Attribution
item.description: Conformal prediction framework provides distribution-free error attribution for multi-agent systems, enabling precise error isolation and automated rollback.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] MIND: Monge Inception Distance for Generative Models Evaluation
item.description: MIND metric evaluates generative models using sliced Wasserstein distance, achieving 10x sample efficiency and 100x faster computation than FID.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] From Model to Data (M2D): Shifting Complexity from GNNs to Graphs for Transparent Graph Learning
item.description: Researchers introduce Model-to-Data distillation to improve GNN interpretability by transferring model complexity into augmented graph data, enabling simpler models to match complex ones' performance.

item.title: [arXiv cs.LG] A Theory of Online Learning with Autoregressive Chain-of-Thought Reasoning
item.description: Online learning theory for autoregressive reasoning shows mistake bounds vary with generation horizon differently than statistical learning framework.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Domain-level metacognitive monitoring in frontier LLMs: A 33-model atlas
item.description: Study of 33 LLMs shows metacognitive monitoring ability varies significantly by domain, with applied knowledge easiest and formal reasoning hardest to self-assess.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] VITA-QinYu: Expressive Spoken Language Model for Role-Playing and Singing
item.description: VITA-QinYu, an expressive spoken language model, generates role-playing and singing voices, outperforming peer models on expressiveness and conversational benchmarks.

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] IntentGrasp: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Intent Understanding
item.description: IntentGrasp: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Intent Understanding

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] TajPersLexon: A Tajik-Persian Lexical Resource and Hybrid Model for Cross-Script Low-Resource NLP
item.description: TajPersLexon: A Tajik-Persian Lexical Resource and Hybrid Model for Cross-Script Low-Resource NLP

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MIST: Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Conversational Assistants for Smart Homes
item.description: MIST: Multimodal Interactive Speech-based Tool-calling Conversational Assistants for Smart Homes

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Reflections and New Directions for Human-Centered Large Language Models
item.description: Reflections and New Directions for Human-Centered Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MELD: Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector for AI-Generated Text
item.description: MELD: Multi-Task Equilibrated Learning Detector for AI-Generated Text

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Can LLMs Take Retrieved Information with a Grain of Salt?
item.description: Can LLMs Take Retrieved Information with a Grain of Salt?

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MultiSoc-4D: A Benchmark for Diagnosing Instruction-Induced Label Collapse in Closed-Set LLM Annotation of Bengali Social Media
item.description: MultiSoc-4D: A Benchmark for Diagnosing Instruction-Induced Label Collapse in Closed-Set LLM Annotation of Bengali Social Media

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Group of Skills: Group-Structured Skill Retrieval for Agent Skill Libraries
item.description: Group of Skills: Group-Structured Skill Retrieval for Agent Skill Libraries

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Towards Closing the Autoregressive Gap in Language Modeling via Entropy-Gated Continuous Bitstream Diffusion
item.description: Towards Closing the Autoregressive Gap in Language Modeling via Entropy-Gated Continuous Bitstream Diffusion

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling
item.description: Cognitive Agent Compilation for Explicit Problem Solver Modeling

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] NSMQ Riddles: A Benchmark of Scientific and Mathematical Riddles for Quizzing Large Language Models
item.description: NSMQ Riddles: A Benchmark of Scientific and Mathematical Riddles for Quizzing Large Language Models

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] GSM-SEM: Benchmark and Framework for Generating Semantically Variant Augmentations
item.description: GSM-SEM: Benchmark and Framework for Generating Semantically Variant Augmentations

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] MedExAgent: Training LLM Agents to Ask, Examine, and Diagnose in Noisy Clinical Environments
item.description: MedExAgent: Training LLM Agents to Ask, Examine, and Diagnose in Noisy Clinical Environments

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] WiCER: Wiki-memory Compile, Evaluate, Refine Iterative Knowledge Compilation for LLM Wiki Systems
item.description: WiCER: Wiki-memory Compile, Evaluate, Refine Iterative Knowledge Compilation for LLM Wiki Systems

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Self-Consolidating Language Models: Continual Knowledge Incorporation from Context
item.description: Self-Consolidating Language Models: Continual Knowledge Incorporation from Context

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Single Ground Truth: Reference Monism as Epistemic Injustice in ASR Evaluation
item.description: Beyond Single Ground Truth: Reference Monism as Epistemic Injustice in ASR Evaluation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] The Translation Tax Is Not a Scalar: A Counterfactual Audit of English-Source Cue Inheritance in Chinese Multilingual Benchmarks
item.description: The Translation Tax Is Not a Scalar: A Counterfactual Audit of English-Source Cue Inheritance in Chinese Multilingual Benchmarks

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] SAGE: Hierarchical LLM-Based Literary Evaluation through Ontology-Grounded Interpretive Dimensions
item.description: SAGE: Hierarchical LLM-Based Literary Evaluation through Ontology-Grounded Interpretive Dimensions

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Retrieve, Integrate, and Synthesize: Spatial-Semantic Grounded Latent Visual Reasoning
item.description: Retrieve, Integrate, and Synthesize: Spatial-Semantic Grounded Latent Visual Reasoning

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Securing Computer-Use Agents: A Unified Architecture-Lifecycle Framework for Deployment-Grounded Reliability
item.description: Securing Computer-Use Agents: A Unified Architecture-Lifecycle Framework for Deployment-Grounded Reliability

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation
item.description: Beyond LoRA vs. Full Fine-Tuning: Gradient-Guided Optimizer Routing for LLM Adaptation

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Region4Web: Rethinking Observation Space Granularity for Web Agents
item.description: Region4Web: Rethinking Observation Space Granularity for Web Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Structural Rationale Distillation via Reasoning Space Compression
item.description: Structural Rationale Distillation via Reasoning Space Compression

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Beyond Reasoning: Reinforcement Learning Unlocks Parametric Knowledge in LLMs
item.description: Beyond Reasoning: Reinforcement Learning Unlocks Parametric Knowledge in LLMs

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] CLIPer: Tailoring Diverse User Preference via Classifier-Guided Inference-Time Personalization
item.description: CLIPer: Tailoring Diverse User Preference via Classifier-Guided Inference-Time Personalization

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Rethinking Experience Utilization in Self-Evolving Language Model Agents
item.description: Rethinking Experience Utilization in Self-Evolving Language Model Agents

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] A Reproducible Multi-Architecture Baseline for Token-Level Chinese Metaphor Identification under the MIPVU Framework
item.description: A Reproducible Multi-Architecture Baseline for Token-Level Chinese Metaphor Identification under the MIPVU Framework

item.title: [arXiv cs.CL] Topology-Enhanced Alignment for Large Language Models: Trajectory Topology Loss and Topological Preference Optimization
item.description: Topology-Enhanced Alignment for Large Language Models: Trajectory Topology Loss and Topological Preference Optimization
